wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 Whispering Hollow.png}} {{E|Whispering Hollow|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} found exclusively in the {{2|Overgrowth}}. This event only appears if the player has at least 50 Gold. == Options == {{Frame|Exchange Gold}} {{TS|negative||Lose 50 Gold.}} {{TS|positive||Procure 2 random {{2|Potions|Potions}}.}}
{{Frame|Hug the Tree}} {{TS|negative||Lose 9 HP.}} {{TS|positive||Choose a card to {{2|Transform}}.}} == Dialogue ==
Making your way through a {{TS|red||hollow of dead trees}} you happen upon a single bone-white tree. Clay baubles hang off its branches, which curve inward like protective ribs. Such a {{TS|purple||creepy tree}}. It whispers. {{TS|blue|up|...make exchange.....}}
{{Frame|Exchange Gold}}
You scatter some {{TS|gold||gold}} at the base of the tree and two of the clay vessels drop to the floor soundlessly. They break open, and contain {{TS|green||perfectly intact potions}} within. You nab the potions and flee.
{{Frame|Hug the Tree}}
The whispering compels you to give it gold but you resist and give the tree a big hug instead! It thrashes about, scratching you with its branches, but eventually calms down. The tree-hugging experience transforms you. ...make hug.....?
